title: Alliance War Bond
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''Alliance War Bond''' was a low-yield, long-term bond issued by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Redeemable five to twenty-five [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the conclusion of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Alliance War Bonds were a risky investment. Those purchasing Alliance War Bonds did not really expect to make money from them, but did so in an effort to support the war against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
